chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text: A person may operate an electric personal assistive mobility device on a sidewalk.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.203 — Sidewalks

A person may operate an electric personal assistive mobility device on a sidewalk.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1318, Sec. 5, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: A person may operate an electric personal assistive mobility device on a sidewalk.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1318, Sec. 5, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
